testcase.name: test_member_registration_success

failure.message: sqlalchemy.exc.InterfaceError: (sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.InterfaceError) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions._base.InterfaceError'>: cannot perform operation: another operation is in progress [SQL: SELECT tenants.id, tenants.name, tenants.slug, tenants.domain, tenants.contact_person, tenants.contact_email, tenants.contact_number, tenants.whatsapp_number, tenants.address, tenants.pin, tenants.upi_id, tenants.castes, tenants.plan, tenants.max_users, tenants.max_admins, tenants.can_override_plan_prices, tenants.logo_key, tenants.is_active, tenants.trial_ends_at, tenants.created_at, tenants.updated_at FROM tenants WHERE tenants.id = $1::UUID AND tenants.is_active = true] [parameters: (UUID('ac21d8be-162f-4c02-9d4a-34714154db9c'),)] (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/rvf5)

testcase.failure:
.venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:840: in _start_transaction await self._transaction.start() .venv\Lib\site-packages\asyncpg\transaction.py:146: in start await self._connection.execute(query) .venv\Lib\site-packages\asyncpg\connection.py:350: in execute result = await self._protocol.query(query, timeout) asyncpg\protocol\protocol.pyx:359: in query ??? asyncpg\protocol\protocol.pyx:744: in asyncpg.protocol.protocol.BaseProtocol._check_state ??? E asyncpg.exceptions._base.InterfaceError: cannot perform operation: another operation is in progress
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\engine\base.py:1967: in _exec_single_context self.dialect.do_execute( .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\engine\default.py:924: in do_execute cursor.execute(statement, parameters) .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:572: in execute self._adapt_connection.await_( .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\util\_concurrency_py3k.py:131: in await_only return current.driver.switch(awaitable) # type: ignore[no-any-return] .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\util\_concurrency_py3k.py:196: in greenlet_spawn value = await result .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:508: in _prepare_and_execute await adapt_connection._start_transaction() .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:842: in _start_transaction self._handle_exception(error) .venv\Lib\site-packages\sqlalchemy\dialects\postgresql\asyncpg.py:789: in _handle_exception raise translated_error from error E sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.AsyncAdapt_asyncpg_dbapi.InterfaceError: <class 'asyncpg.exceptions._base.InterfaceError'>: cannot perform operation: another operation is in progress
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests\test_users.py:38: in test_member_registration_success response = await client.post( .venv\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1892: in post return await self.request( .venv\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1574: in request return await self.send(request, auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) .venv\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1661: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( .venv\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1689: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( .venv\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1726: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) testcase.name: test_member_registration_weak_password
